name: Phill | Heroes of Envell
description:
Waiter! Phill.

Ilya is hurting him again.

Stand up for him.

Or can take Ilya's character.

To be honest, I'm annoyed by his name. His name is Фил, and I've been trying to figure out whether to call him Fil, Fill, Phill or Phil. Additionally, in the Russian and English dubs, all the characters have different names, which is driving me crazy.
creator: Dark Doctor
